title: Connecting Automations to "My Work" Space for Reminders on a Dashboard
excerpt:
It would be very handy to have the ability to link automations that result in reminders and have those reminders populate in the “My Work” space. 
This helps with organization of staying on top of tasks, follow ups, etc. …

posts.author: medinsu (Susana Medina )
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be very handy to have the ability to link automations that result in reminders and have those reminders populate in the “My Work” space.
This helps with organization of staying on top of tasks, follow ups, etc.
